description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build on Emscripten that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a mogemimi/gamedev-emscripten container with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release build configurations. Check out the repository with submodules, set up the Emscripten environment, verify the Emscripten compiler version, generate Ninja files with CMake, build with ninja, and run tests with Node.js.
